description: Detects private non-final fields in Java that could be made final. Simplified from Rust: flags all field_declaration nodes. Cannot check for private+non-final modifier combination, injection annotations (@Autowired, @Inject, @Value), volatile fields, or assignment-only-in-constructor detection.

flag.message: field declaration detected -- verify private fields are final where possible (missing_final detection simplified: modifier analysis not available in JSON DSL)
